params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Revive. Focus tightly on: vanity, mirror, bathroom tile, matte black or dark stone vanity top, warm LED mirror or brass sconce (aged warm brass accent), neutral towels and single small plant or ceramic. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A measured, low-key luxury Japandi interior: deep matte walls and smoked oak joinery warmed by brass accents, natural textiles and a restrained plant presence. Spaces feel intimate and textural with layered ambient light; styling is sparse, family-ready and includes a compact standing work corner. Prioritize calm sightlines between living, dining and kitchen; keep material and color consistency across shared objects. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
